title: Fable 5.0 vs Opus 4.8: AI Model Powerhouse Comparison! #shorts
summary: A video comparison of two AI models shows that Fable 5.0 demonstrates potential limits while Opus 4.8 outperforms in agentic tasks like coding and knowledge work applications.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof compares two AI models, Fable 5.0 and Opus 4.8, on agentic tasks. The takeaway: Fable 5.0 shows potential limits, while Opus 4.8 outperforms on agentic work such as coding and knowledge work applications. The framing matters for anyone weighing model choice against agent-driven use cases rather than raw benchmarks alone.
